problem_text_cn: 1420 μ⁻子被铅核（$^{208}\text{Pb}$，$Z=82$）俘获，形成铅μ⁻原子。μ⁻子质量是电子的207倍，铅核电荷均匀分布在半径$R = 7.7\ \mathrm{fm}$的球体内。按玻尔理论求：(1) μ⁻子的头两个玻尔轨道半径；(2) 铅μ⁻原子的头两个能级的能量；(3) 铅μ⁻原子的赖曼系第一条谱线的波长；(4) 若将铅核视为点电荷，结果又如何？
problem_text_en: 1420 A $\mu^-$ meson is captured by a lead nucleus ($^{208}\text{Pb}$, $Z=82$), forming a lead $\mu^-$ atom. The mass of the $\mu^-$ is 207 times that of an electron, and the lead nucleus has a uniform charge distribution within a sphere of radius $R = 7.7\ \mathrm{fm}$. Using Bohr theory, find: (1) The first two Bohr orbital radii of the $\mu^-$; (2) The first two energy levels of the lead $\mu^-$ atom; (3) The wavelength of the first line in the Lyman series of the lead $\mu^-$ atom; (4) What are the results if the lead nucleus is treated as a point charge?
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】(1) 核内（$r<R$）和核外（$r>R$）分别用不同的势能公式，由角动量量子化和向心力公式解得轨道半径；(2) 代入轨道半径得能级能量；(3) 赖曼系第一条谱线对应$n=2\to n=1$跃迁，$\lambda = \frac{hc}{E_2 - E_1}$；(4) 点电荷模型下，$r>R$的能级公式适用，重新计算能级和波长。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】(1) Use different potential formulas for inside ($r<R$) and outside ($r>R$) the nucleus, solve for orbital radii from angular momentum quantization and centripetal force; (2) Substitute radii to find energy levels; (3) First Lyman line corresponds to $n=2\to n=1$ transition, $\lambda = \frac{hc}{E_2 - E_1}$; (4) For point charge model, use $r>R$ energy level formula and recalculate levels and wavelength.
problem_answer: (1) 头两个轨道半径：$\boldsymbol{r_1 = 6.14\ \mathrm{fm}}$（核内），$\boldsymbol{r_2 = 12.48\ \mathrm{fm}}$（核外）；(2) 头两个能级能量：$\boldsymbol{E_1 = -13.25\ \mathrm{MeV}}$，$\boldsymbol{E_2 = -4.73\ \mathrm{MeV}}$；(3) 赖曼系第一条谱线波长$\boldsymbol{\lambda = 1.46 \times 10^{-4}\ \mathrm{nm}}$；(4) 点电荷模型下，$\boldsymbol{E_1' = -18.93\ \mathrm{MeV}}$，$\boldsymbol{E_2 = -4.73\ \mathrm{MeV}}$，波长$\boldsymbol{\lambda' = 8.73 \times 10^{-5}\ \mathrm{nm}}$。
